name: Faith's Chutney Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Plain cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the chutney and cheese together by hand. Do not use a food processor or blender; otherwise, you end up with a cheese sauce.
2. Choose your chutney: Pix uses her own green tomato chutney, which is a spicy combination of tomatoes, onions, raisins, and walnuts. Any variety of chutney works well.
- Use the spread to stuff snow peas or sugar snap peas.
- Spread on cucumber or zucchini rounds, sweet meal biscuits, water biscuits, or slightly toasted miniature bagels.
- The chutney spread makes a tasty sandwich when combined with smoked turkey or Virginia ham, or by itself on date and nut or buckwheat walnut bread.
